content.en:
Rumble!!!!

One by one, the consciousness of Dao Ancestors entered the Quasi-Dao Realm and followed the breath of the Domain Realm to probe the past.

Soon, these Dao Ancestors discovered a small space.

Within this small space is a building, a relic of the Realm, from which the aura of the Realm emanates.

"I didn't expect there to be a domain ruin here, why didn't I find it before?"

A Dao Ancestor was curious.

"It's not surprising, what a mysterious world the domain realm is, even if it's just a fragment of the domain realm, I'm afraid it has unimaginable abilities, and it's not strange to hide it from us Dao Ancestors. "

Another Dao Ancestor said.

These Dao Ancestors didn't waste their time chatting, but went deep into the ruins to investigate the situation here.

Although they did not descend from their true body, just the advent of consciousness was enough to detect many situations, and the ruins here were not so mysterious that they could not stop these Dao Ancestors at all.

Soon after, these Dao Ancestors basically learned about the ruins.

"It's a pity, this should be the station of a certain sect in the domain realm, and it is the station of a not strong sect, and even this force does not have a Dao Ancestor, at most the strongest person is a true ancestor. Some of the sect ruins are still relatively intact, and there are some treasures, but there are basically nothing we need, and the inheritance here is probably of little use to us!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sighed.

"It's useless to us, but for those True Monarchs in the Dao Realm, this should be regarded as a great treasure, and even for True Ancestors, this relic can bring great benefits!"

"Then let the little ones fight!"

The Dao Ancestors no longer paid attention to this ruin, but their hearts paid more attention to the Dao Realm.

They were already convinced that there must be other inheritance relics related to the domain realm in the Quasi-Dao Realm, but they couldn't find them at the moment, but as time passed, these domain realm relics would definitely appear one by one.

If there really were such relics of the realm that contained the inheritance above the Dao Ancestors, they would enter it at all costs.

......

Void Heaven Temple.

The consciousness incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor descended, informing the many True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple that a relic in the Quasi-Dao Realm had been born, and many True Monarchs could enter the battle for the opportunity.

Other forces also received summons from the Dao Ancestors and began to go to the ruins.

The birth of the ruins also completely caused a sensation in the entire Quasi-Dao Realm, and even Ye Tian came out of the retreat.

After all, Dao Ancestors personally summoned the interrogation, and this relic must not be an ordinary ruin, otherwise there would be no need for the Dao Ancestors to personally summon the interrogation.

You must know that even when the realm of the origin was born, the Dao Ancestors have never appeared!

It can be seen that the preciousness of this relic must still be above the realm of the Boundary Source!

This time.

The ruins of the realm were born in the territory of the Vajra True Kingdom.

The Vajra True Kingdom was established by the Vajra One Vein, and the Vajra One Vein and the Void Heaven One Vein are one of the Ten Chaos Veins, and the Ten Veins of Chaos are the alliance of ten top powers, and they are all relatively loose top powers.

Like some chaotic sect forces, the management is very strict, not paying attention to seniority, only paying attention to strength, the stronger the strength, the stronger the strength, even above their own masters, let their masters be regarded as their own subordinates.

The Ten Veins of Chaos are different, and they attach great importance to master and apprentice and generation.

It is precisely because of the different management that the Ten Veins of Chaos do not get along with many top powers, and even have deep contradictions.

The strength of the Vajra First Vein is second only to the Void Heaven First Vein, but to a certain extent, many forces would rather offend the Void Heaven First Vein than offend the Vajra First Vein, because the Vajra First Vein is known for its invincibility in defense.

For example, the first Dao Ancestor of the Vajra lineage, Vajra Dao Ancestor, may be weaker than the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, but the defense is too perverted, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is estimated to be unable to break his defense.

If it is a protracted battle, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is estimated to be consumed to death.

The Chaos Alchemy Technique of the Vajra First Vein can be called the strongest Chaos Alchemy Technique, so the Vajra First Vein is very strong at the True Monarch level, but it is weaker at the True Ancestor level.

Among the 1,000 on the True Monarch List, King Kong True Kingdom occupies seven places, which shows the strength of King Kong True Kingdom at the True Monarch level.

Ye Tian followed Longhai Zhenjun and his party to the King Kong True Kingdom, and Balong Zhenjun of the King Kong True Kingdom came to greet him in person.

"Friends of the Void Heaven Temple, welcome to the Vajra True Kingdom!"

Barong Zhenjun said with a smile.

"Barong Zhenjun, your aura is stronger than before, it seems that you are not far from the realm of half-step True Ancestor!"

Long Hai Zhenjun said.

"Longhai Zhenjun, don't be joking, I'm afraid it will be a long time before I am from the realm of the half-step true ancestor, and the difference between one step is not so easy to cross, but it is the Longhai true monarch that you are about to step into the realm of the half-step true monarch!" Balong Zhenjun touted.

The two touted each other, and it didn't take long to talk about the ruins.

"Barong Zhenjun, the ruins are in your real country, what do you know about the ruins?"

Long Hai Zhenjun asked.

He cared very much about the ruins, and even the Dao Ancestor personally sent a message, perhaps there was a treasure in it that helped him step into the half-step True Ancestor realm.

"I can't get in now, and I don't know what's in the ruins!"

Ba Long Zhenjun shook his head and said.

"The ruins are in your real country, and you didn't send anyone in?"

"We wanted to send people in, but the Dao Ancestors blocked the entrance to the ruins, I'm afraid that the Dao Ancestors will not unseal the entrance to the ruins until the major forces have almost arrived!" Ba Long Zhenjun explained.

"I see!"

Long Hai Zhenjun knows.

He didn't expect that the Dao Ancestors would personally block the entrance to the ruins, which was a very rare situation.

It can be seen that the value of this relic is beyond his imagination!

In the following days, one by one, the top big forces arrived, and in less than two days, countless big forces came to the King Kong True Kingdom one after another, gathering at the entrance of the ruins.

"There are too many people!"

Ye Tian looked around and couldn't help but think in his heart.

With so many True Monarchs, can there be so many treasures in just one ruin that are enough for these True Monarchs?

If there are not many treasures, then the competition may be very fierce!

Last time, the Realm of the Origin Realm had let the Quasi-Dao Realm fall at least tens of millions of True Monarchs, and it wasn't too much to distribute to each big force, but it was also an unimaginably huge loss!

I don't know how many True Monarchs will fall this time?

At this moment, the voices of the Dao Ancestors came.

"We will set a ban, and those who lack strength will not be allowed to enter the ruins, so as not to be in danger of falling!"

Hearing this, many True Monarchs' faces changed.

If you can't get in, won't you get anything?

As for the True Monarchs on the True Monarch List, they are very calm, their strength is strong, even if the Dao Ancestors set a ban, they can easily enter.

Rumble!!!!

In an instant, the ban was laid down.

In fact, there was no way for the Dao Ancestors to make such a decision, because this ruin was not very large, and if so many True Monarchs entered together, the fight would be too serious.

In a small space, with so many true monarchs fighting, maybe even the true monarchs will fall.

And if the fighting is too frequent, they are also afraid that this ruin will be destroyed.

Therefore, only by letting a small number of True Monarchs enter can they obtain a lot of benefits and create a group of True Ancestors.
